title: The Neutrality Project — who's the most neutral AI?
voiceStyle: Narrate clearly and evenly, like a credible explainer — engaged but calm and non-partisan:

scenes.text: The most politically *neutral* AI right now? It's *Grok*.
scenes.voiceSegment: The most politically neutral AI right now? It's Grok.

That's the finding from The Neutrality Project — an independent group that takes no money from the labs it grades. They put 18 AI models through almost 4,000 real opinion questions, and mapped where each one leans.

scenes.label: scores leaned left
scenes.voiceSegment: Out of 108 scores, 97 leaned left. Every model leaned at least a little.
On the scoreboard, Grok lands closest to dead center — the only one that's basically neutral.

scenes.label: Phi-4 refused — most one-sided
scenes.voiceSegment: The most one-sided? Microsoft's Phi-4 — which also dodged one in four questions.
To keep it honest, models from three different countries set the scale — not the project's own idea of the center.
It matters, because when an AI writes your summary, its lean quietly becomes yours.

scenes.text: Most neutral: Grok. Check the rest.
scenes.voiceSegment: The most neutral AI is Grok. Now you can check the rest yourself.
